CustomField.description: used to calculate the price of oil for CMRA
CustomField.formula: IF(LEFT(TEXT(NATT_Unit__c),8) = "Supra S6", IF(ISPICKVAL(NATT_Oil_Type__c,"Mineral"), 4.71, 10.69), IF(OR(LEFT(TEXT(NATT_Unit__c),8)= "Supra S7", LEFT(TEXT(NATT_Unit__c),8)= "Supra S8"), IF(ISPICKVAL(NATT_Oil_Type__c, "Mineral"), 4.71, 10.69), IF(ISPICKVAL(NATT_Oil_Type__c, "Mineral"),4.71,10.69)))
CustomField.label: zDeleteOil Price (per qt)
